records.ety: [L. comminatio, from comminari to threaten; com- + minari to threaten: cf. F. commination.]

defs: A threat or threatening; a denunciation of punishment or vengeance.
quotes: With terrible comminations to all them that did resist.

defs: An office in the liturgy of the Church of England, used on Ash Wednesday, containing a recital of God's anger and judgments against sinners.
